data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the optional link to the source fulfillment assignment/unit, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement. The linked use case specifies the need for this link, yet no API reads or persisted state checks are included to verify its existence. Therefore, the step is inconclusive as it lacks the necessary evidence to assert a hard requirement failure or coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the presence of an optional link to the source fulfillment assignment/unit.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of the optional link.
